debug_info.goal:

r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
f2 :

    circleAverage (fun a => circleAverage (fun x => log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r) 0 1
⊢ CircleIntegrable (fun a => log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x => f x - a) 0‖) 0 1
